selections.name: Dame Florence
selections.reason: Tracked the speed and boxed on steadily for 2nd last start. Knocking on the door and looks ready to win.

selections.name: Pari Moi
selections.reason: Rolled along in front and was edged out late for 2nd last start. Will be prominent from the inside draw.

selections.name: North Dakota
selections.reason: Improved 3rd last start when second-up. Fitter now and can figure in the finish.

selections.name: Ertijaaj
selections.reason: Resuming from a lengthy break. Showed ability on debut in the UK and has trialed well.

danger_horse.name: Some Chance
danger_horse.reason: Has been around the mark in recent starts without winning. Place claims.

selections.name: Cardi Bee
selections.reason: Racing very well. Narrowly beaten last start after a dominant win prior. Top chance despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Flowerdale
selections.reason: Solid 5th last start in a stronger race. Better suited here and can bounce back.

selections.name: Blue Cowboy
selections.reason: Fitter for first-up run. Has ability on his day and can improve second-up.

selections.name: Cameron Falls
selections.reason: Sat on the pace and boxed on for 3rd last start. Consistent type who can place again.

danger_horse.name: Rock Them Jools
danger_horse.reason: Forgive last start on a slow track. Capable of better on firmer footing.

selections.name: Morning Whisper
selections.reason: Resuming. Showed promise on debut in a Listed race. Has trialed very well leading into this.

selections.name: Free Flying
selections.reason: Resuming. Has stakes experience and draws the inside. Big threat.

selections.name: Rubare
selections.reason: Returned from a break with a solid 2nd. Fitter now and has claims.

selections.name: Forbidden Desire
selections.reason: Improved 3rd last start. Can continue to progress.

danger_horse.name: Obambulate
danger_horse.reason: First starter by Tiger Of Malay. Won a recent jump-out and draws well.

selections.name: Aura
selections.reason: Form is hard to fault. Narrowly beaten last start and gets a jockey upgrade to Ben Melham.

selections.name: Pula
selections.reason: Won well last start in heavy going. Can go on with it now she has found winning form.

selections.name: Autumn Slide
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Solid 3rd last start and will take plenty of holding out.

selections.name: On Broadway
selections.reason: Won well last start when tracking the speed. Can measure up again.

danger_horse.name: Inherently
danger_horse.reason: Consistent type who was 2nd last start. Tricky draw but has claims.

selections.name: Parvenu
selections.reason: Progressive filly who scored a dominant 4-length win two starts back. Sets up well here.

selections.name: There Were Roses
selections.reason: Second-up. Won well first-up over 7f. Tricky draw but has upside.

selections.name: Kalmana
selections.reason: Has been racing in stronger company. Drops in grade and can figure despite the wide gate.

selections.name: Good Harmony
selections.reason: Won well last start when running on from midfield. Drawn well and can sneak a place.

danger_horse.name: Buthelezi
danger_horse.reason: Resuming. Has strong WA form and trialed well recently.

selections.name: Tres Magnifique
selections.reason: Very progressive filly chasing a hat-trick. Won easily last start and looks the one to beat again.

selections.name: Tuscaloosa Gem
selections.reason: Form is hard to fault. Narrowly won last start and will be prominent throughout.

selections.name: Tiz Worthy
selections.reason: Solid 2nd last start behind Tuscaloosa Gem. Meets her better at the weights here.

selections.name: Mintulee
selections.reason: Forgive last start. Previous form was sound and gets a 3kg claim.

danger_horse.name: One Hard Lady
danger_horse.reason: Third-up. Solid 4th in a strong race last start. In the mix.

selections.name: Magnabelle Royale
selections.reason: Third-up today. Scored a dominant 3.5 length win last start. Wide draw is the only concern.

selections.name: In Haste
selections.reason: Resuming. Has Group 3 form in NZ. Talented filly who sets up ideally here.

selections.name: Landmark
selections.reason: Resuming. Won first-up last campaign and has trialed well. Can be charging late.

selections.name: Aqueduct
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick. Won narrowly last start but is in great form.

danger_horse.name: Aleppo Pine
danger_horse.reason: Second-up. Capable of sharp improvement on firmer footing.

selections.name: Empire Song
selections.reason: Form is hard to fault. Narrowly beaten last start in a strong race. Top chance despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Invincible Woman
selections.reason: Second-up. Solid 3rd first-up. Has Group 3 experience and will be fitter.

selections.name: Cattle Camp
selections.reason: Won on debut. Steps up in grade but looks a progressive type.

selections.name: Hook 'N' Spur
selections.reason: Forgive last start on a wet track. Capable of better on firm ground.

danger_horse.name: Bajaria
danger_horse.reason: Third-up. Narrowly beaten last start and has ability.
